testcase.name: refresh_OldTokenAfterRotation_Returns401

testcase.name: fullHappyPath_RegisterLoginRefreshAccess_Succeeds

testcase.name: accessProtected_InvalidToken_Returns401Unauthorised
testcase.system-out: 11:36:32.846 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-1] DEBUG c.g.r.p.h.a.a.a.o.JwtTokenProvider - Token validation failed: Invalid serialized unsecured/JWS/JWE object: Too many part delimiters

testcase.name: login_WrongPassword_Returns401Unauthorised
testcase.system-out: 11:36:32.913 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.i.RegistrationController - Registration request received for email: user-f6a5ba2f-d84f-49f9-bd69-e0d799927a64@example.com 11:36:32.913 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] DEBUG c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.RegisterUserService - Processing registration request for email: user-f6a5ba2f-d84f-49f9-bd69-e0d799927a64@example.com Hibernate: select uje1_0.id from users uje1_0 where uje1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select uje1_0.id, uje1_0.created_at, uje1_0.email, uje1_0.password_hash, uje1_0.role, uje1_0.updated_at from users uje1_0 where uje1_0.id=? Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password_hash, role, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 11:36:33.477 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.RegisterUserService - User registered successfully with id: 3c468d46-48be-48c3-9428-8a2b55a79022 11:36:33.477 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-2] INFO c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.i.RegistrationController - User registered successfully with id: 3c468d46-48be-48c3-9428-8a2b55a79022 11:36:33.488 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] INFO c.g.r.p.h.a.a.a.i.AuthenticationController - Login request received 11:36:33.488 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] DEBUG c.g.r.p.h.a.a.a.LoginService - Processing login request for email: user-f6a5ba2f-d84f-49f9-bd69-e0d799927a64@example.com Hibernate: select uje1_0.id, uje1_0.created_at, uje1_0.email, uje1_0.password_hash, uje1_0.role, uje1_0.updated_at from users uje1_0 where uje1_0.email=? 11:36:34.037 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-3] WARN c.g.r.p.h.a.a.a.LoginService - Login rejected — wrong password for email: user-f6a5ba2f-d84f-49f9-bd69-e0d799927a64@example.com

testcase.name: register_DuplicateEmail_Returns409Conflict
testcase.system-out: 11:36:34.135 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.i.RegistrationController - Registration request received for email: user-759b1755-1258-4edf-b016-279629f06b92@example.com 11:36:34.136 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] DEBUG c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.RegisterUserService - Processing registration request for email: user-759b1755-1258-4edf-b016-279629f06b92@example.com Hibernate: select uje1_0.id from users uje1_0 where uje1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select uje1_0.id, uje1_0.created_at, uje1_0.email, uje1_0.password_hash, uje1_0.role, uje1_0.updated_at from users uje1_0 where uje1_0.id=? Hibernate: insert into users (created_at, email, password_hash, role, updated_at, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) 11:36:34.536 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.RegisterUserService - User registered successfully with id: 653fb808-4c7b-4536-9f68-ef97b3916702 11:36:34.536 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-4] INFO c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.i.RegistrationController - User registered successfully with id: 653fb808-4c7b-4536-9f68-ef97b3916702 11:36:34.543 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] INFO c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.i.RegistrationController - Registration request received for email: user-759b1755-1258-4edf-b016-279629f06b92@example.com 11:36:34.543 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] DEBUG c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.RegisterUserService - Processing registration request for email: user-759b1755-1258-4edf-b016-279629f06b92@example.com Hibernate: select uje1_0.id from users uje1_0 where uje1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only 11:36:34.550 [http-nio-auto-1-exec-5] WARN c.g.r.p.h.a.r.a.RegisterUserService - Registration rejected — duplicate email: user-759b1755-1258-4edf-b016-279629f06b92@example.com
